data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Bundle pricing (cheaper together)', but the evidence does not confirm that the pricing structure reflects a discount for bundled services and products. The linked use case mentions the need for bundle pricing, yet the prior steps only show individual pricing for services and products without any indication of a cheaper combined price. This indicates a gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that bundle pricing is implemented or that a discount is applied when services and products are purchased together.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
